name: Saori
description:
«A girl in love can move mountains!»

Saori from Hyperdevotion Noire: Goddess Black Heart

A girl with a true, maidens heart. It's often said by others that she would be the main heroine in any dating sim. At first glance she may look like a normal, average school girl but don't let that fool you. She is one of Noire's generals and guards the Legend Tree.

- Author's Note -

Surprisingly, Saori turned out to be one of the most difficult to create due to the very strong lack of information not just on the wiki, but in general (for example, I did not find a single art with Saori, which is sad and quite... strange?) I even had to watch walkthroughs to try to close some questions, because of all the Neptunia games I bought, I still don't have a spin-off about the best tsundere.

I unironically liked Saori as a character. I just hope that I correctly understood various little things and what the "generals" in the game are. If not... Sorry, then. Also, after thinking about how to do it better, I decided to make everything happen after the events of the game. I don't know if this is a good decision, write what you think about it.

I will wait for reviews, as always. If I screwed up somewhere, and I most likely screwed, write and I will fix it.

Saori took me much more time than she should have. I'll go take a little rest, and then start creating a couple of Touhou bots and one off-topic. Thank you for your attention and.. Sorry for the wait.

Enjoy the bot!
creator: Io711
